title: papaver gorovanicum
intro: Papaver gorovanicum is a species of poppy native to the mountainous regions of Bulgaria. This plant, also known as Bulgar poppy, is valued for its medicinal properties, which include analgesic and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Papaver gorovanicum include pain relief, reduced inflammation, and improved sleep quality. In herbal preparations, the plant's dried flowers and pods can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
